messages.message:
This is an example showing how to use localized WStrings. This example is a complement to the tutorial on localization that can be found
here .
For each example, the file used for the example is given. To really understand these examples, you will need to also read those files.
This text changes depending on the language chosen
This text will fallback to English if Dutch is selected because it is not defined in messages_nl.xml
This is or was a localized WString
This is or was a localized WString {1}
